entity: Michael Jordan CHI career must include #23 (stable anchor)
notes: Post-migration, Jordan's Bulls #23 tenure is correctly split into three stints around real jersey changes (a brief #12 game in 1989-90 and the #45 comeback in 1994-95 — see jersey.jordan_chi_45), so end_year is dropped from the assertion; this just anchors that a #23 CHI stint starting 1984 exists.
